mapper.select:
select * from finance_currency where 1 = 1
and ( currency_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or currency_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and currency_code like concat('%', #{currencyCode}, '%')
and currency_name like concat('%', #{currencyName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
and is_default = #{isDefault}
and date_format(effective_rate_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.effectiveBeginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(effective_rate_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.effectiveEndTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by is_default desc, status asc, currency_code asc
select * from finance_currency where status = '0' order by is_default desc, currency_code asc

select concat(currency_name, ' (', currency_code, ')') as label, currency_code as value, currency_symbol as symbol, amount_precision as amountPrecision from finance_currency where status = '0' order by is_default desc, currency_code asc
select * from finance_currency where currency_code = #{currencyCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into finance_currency( currency_code, currency_name, currency_symbol, base_currency_code, official_rate, effective_rate, rate_precision, amount_precision, rounding_mode, adjustment_mode, adjustment_value, official_rate_time, effective_rate_time, is_default, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{currencyCode}, #{currencyName}, #{currencySymbol}, #{baseCurrencyCode}, #{officialRate}, #{effectiveRate}, #{ratePrecision}, #{amountPrecision}, #{roundingMode}, #{adjustmentMode}, #{adjustmentValue}, #{officialRateTime}, #{effectiveRateTime}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update finance_currency set currency_name = #{currencyName}, currency_symbol = #{currencySymbol}, base_currency_code = #{baseCurrencyCode}, official_rate = #{officialRate}, effective_rate = #{effectiveRate}, rate_precision = #{ratePrecision}, amount_precision = #{amountPrecision}, rounding_mode = #{roundingMode}, adjustment_mode = #{adjustmentMode}, adjustment_value = #{adjustmentValue}, official_rate_time = #{officialRateTime}, effective_rate_time = #{effectiveRateTime}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where currency_code = #{currencyCode}
update finance_currency set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where currency_code = #{currencyCode}
update finance_currency set is_default = 'N', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where is_default = 'Y' and currency_code <> #{excludeCurrencyCode}

update finance_currency set base_currency_code = #{baseCurrencyCode}, official_rate = #{officialRate}, effective_rate = #{effectiveRate}, official_rate_time = #{officialRateTime}, effective_rate_time = #{effectiveRateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where currency_code = #{currencyCode}
mapper.insert: insert into finance_currency_rate_history( currency_code, base_currency_code, official_rate, effective_rate, adjustment_mode, adjustment_value, source_type, source_config_id, official_rate_time, effective_rate_time, change_reason, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{currencyCode}, #{baseCurrencyCode}, #{officialRate}, #{effectiveRate}, #{adjustmentMode}, #{adjustmentValue}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceConfigId}, #{officialRateTime}, #{effectiveRateTime}, #{changeReason}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from finance_currency_rate_history where currency_code = #{currencyCode} order by create_time desc, rate_history_id desc
select * from finance_currency_sync_config order by status asc, sync_config_id asc limit 1
select * from finance_currency_sync_config where provider_code = #{providerCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into finance_currency_sync_config( provider_code, provider_name, base_currency_code, api_base_url, auth_type, credential_ciphertext, credential_key_id, credential_masked, request_timeout_ms, retry_count, schedule_type, cron_expression, rate_anchor_time, sync_enabled, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{providerCode}, #{providerName}, #{baseCurrencyCode}, #{apiBaseUrl}, #{authType}, #{credentialCiphertext}, #{credentialKeyId}, #{credentialMasked}, #{requestTimeoutMs}, #{retryCount}, #{scheduleType}, #{cronExpression}, #{rateAnchorTime}, #{syncEnabled}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update finance_currency_sync_config set provider_code = #{providerCode}, provider_name = #{providerName}, base_currency_code = #{baseCurrencyCode}, api_base_url = #{apiBaseUrl}, auth_type = #{authType}, credential_ciphertext = #{credentialCiphertext}, credential_key_id = #{credentialKeyId}, credential_masked = #{credentialMasked}, request_timeout_ms = #{requestTimeoutMs}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, rate_anchor_time = #{rateAnchorTime}, sync_enabled = #{syncEnabled}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where sync_config_id = #{syncConfigId}
update finance_currency_sync_config set last_sync_time = sysdate(), last_sync_status = #{lastSyncStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sync_config_id = #{syncConfigId}
